row079_contract.completion_criteria: Promoted Foley records have exact required tags or explicit unknowns that prevent incompatible use.
required_behavior: every promoted Foley asset contains every required dimension
known values resolve against one frozen taxonomy revision
unknown values are explicit rather than inferred or silently omitted
an unknown or missing exact-match dimension blocks incompatible use
source evidence and enrichment provenance remain attributable
promotion is fail closed on schema taxonomy provenance or compatibility failure

source_authority.citation: Row079 Fine-grained Foley taxonomy enrichment, lines 177-181

dependency_authority.reason: Fine-grained labels must bind to accepted single-event or multi-event segment identities; Row074 lacks the accepted segmenter, virtual-clip contract, and calibration needed for that attribution.
Room and source-perspective enrichment must be grounded in accepted acoustic evidence; Row076 currently has path hints and rendered-room techniques only, not source-asset dryness or room authority.
Row079 cannot treat derived labels as enrichment authority until Row078 preserves per-source evidence, conflicts, explicit unknowns, and deterministic ensemble resolution.

retained_index_input_boundary.interpretation: The retained index has complete coarse metadata columns but no exact Row079 taxonomy record at any nesting level. Existing unknown-like values are useful blockers-in-waiting, but no machine-readable promotion or compatibility field currently makes them fail closed for exact-match use.
retained_index_input_boundary.scope: Existing retained JSONL bytes only. No source audio decode, segmentation, feature extraction, model inference, enrichment, promotion, EC2 contact, or runtime mutation was performed.

repository_implementation_search.unrelated_search_matches_excluded: Image and Mask Factory body-region/contact-pair implementations, Wave22 visual contact taxonomies, spatial-render room schemas, and general multimodal promotion checks do not implement Row079 Foley asset enrichment or exact-match blocking.
repository_implementation_search.interpretation: The only direct Row079 implementation reference is the planning work-package builder.

acceptance_gaps: accepted Row074 segment and virtual-clip identity for multi-event source attribution
accepted Row076 source acoustic room and perspective evidence
accepted Row078 source-attributed tag ensemble with conflict and unknown preservation
one frozen versioned Foley taxonomy registry with aliases hierarchy and explicit unknown sentinels
separate event family contact pair body region footwear gait phase surface material object material force attack motion room and perspective fields
schema requiring every dimension rather than nullable or omitted convenience fields
exact source record segment and canonical PCM hashes for every enrichment
enricher code model feature and taxonomy identities
per-field evidence source confidence and known unknown or ambiguous classification
deterministic conflict resolution that cannot erase upstream disagreement
typed compatibility projection for exact-match retrieval
fail-closed rule blocking incompatible use when any required dimension is unknown missing stale or invalid
promotion validator requiring schema taxonomy provenance and compatibility PASS
adversarial tests for missing fields null empty whitespace alias collision unknown values and invalid combinations
semantic consistency tests such as footwear versus contact pair and surface versus room
deterministic same-input repeat proof
calibration and held-out labeled Foley datasets with immutable disjoint identities
registered per-dimension precision recall calibration unknown coverage and incompatibility-block metrics
full retained-library enrichment and promoted-subset reconciliation or exact per-input blockers
tracker-declared direct runtime QA and evidence artifact

downstream_holds.task_name: Hybrid structured, lexical, embedding, and hash retrieval index
downstream_holds.reason: Structured exact-match retrieval cannot be certified until Row079 provides complete typed fields and unknown-driven compatibility blockers.

downstream_holds.task_name: Explainable weighted audio candidate scoring and ranking
downstream_holds.reason: Candidate scoring needs accepted Row079 taxonomy dimensions and provenance before semantic fit features can be trusted.

downstream_holds.task_name: Layer construction and deterministic composite Foley synthesis
downstream_holds.reason: Composite Foley layers cannot be selected safely without compatible event contact material force and room tags.
Variation policies require exact taxonomy identities and compatibility boundaries to preserve semantic class.
Generation prompts and output validation require the accepted Row079 taxonomy contract.

downstream_holds.task_name: Generated-sound technical, semantic, timing, acoustic, and uniqueness QA
downstream_holds.reason: Generated-sound semantic QA cannot measure taxonomy correctness against an absent Row079 authority.

downstream_holds.task_name: Autonomous sound intelligence production acceptance and full-system certification
downstream_holds.reason: Full-system certification explicitly requires Row079 completion.

test_and_runtime_boundary.reason_tests_not_executed: No Row079 implementation bytes exist or changed. Existing image contact, mask body-region, spatial-render room, and generic multimodal promotion tests do not validate Foley taxonomy enrichment or unknown-driven exact-match blocking.

scheduler_and_worker_containment.containment_note: The scheduled-task incident containment state remains untouched. All paused automations and disabled worker or Mask tasks remain outside this evidence-only Codex final-authority audit.

hold_decision.reason: The retained library preserves coarse event, material, attack, and room-suitability metadata plus many explicit unknown-like values, and two unaccepted draft schemas provide partial reusable shapes. However, all three dependencies remain incomplete; no retained record contains the exact Row079 taxonomy fields; no frozen taxonomy, enricher, validator, promotion guard, direct tests, or compatibility record exists; and unknown values do not currently block incompatible exact-match use.
hold_decision.safe_next_action: After Rows074, 076, and 078 are accepted, freeze one versioned Foley taxonomy; define required non-omittable fields for event family, contact pair, body region, footwear, gait phase, surface and object material, force, attack, motion, room, and source perspective; preserve explicit unknown and ambiguity values with per-field evidence and confidence; implement deterministic source-bound enrichment; derive a typed exact-match compatibility projection; reject promotion on missing, stale, invalid, conflicting, or incompatible unknown dimensions; exercise adversarial schema, alias, cross-field, unknown, conflict, and repeatability cases; validate against immutable disjoint labeled fixtures; reconcile all retained assets and the promoted subset or exact blockers; and emit the tracker-declared runtime artifact. EC2 is not allowed for Row079. Continue independent Codex PM/QA work meanwhile.
